## Checklist

Before submitting this PR, please check all of the following:

- [ ] All [pre-commit checks](https://pre-commit.com/#install) pass locally (run `pre-commit run --all-files`).
- [ ] Unit tests have been added or updated to cover the changes.
- [ ] Documentation or Jupyter notebooks have been updated (if applicable).
- [ ] The code follows the style guidelines of the project (e.g., [Ruff](https://beta.ruff.rs/docs/) rules).
- [ ] Tested compatibility with supported versions of Python and key dependencies.
- [ ] The PR title is formatted correctly (e.g., `FIX: <description>`, `ENH: <description>`, `DOCS: <description>`).
